en: I think as sports fans, we kind of had it coming, right?
Because how many times have you gone to a game, right?
You got a little too drunk, you started screaming at some dude on the field,
who could clearly kick the shit out of you, right?
If you saw him in the parking lot, you'd be like,
hey, can you sign my stamp collection? I think you're awesome.
You get in the game, you're all drunk, you're like, you suck, buddy!
You're like beating up whole rows of people at once, like...
